description: Cross-language conformance for the per-profile watch-state SYNC document merge. Given a local watch log + an incoming one (from another device), merge_log() returns the converged document. Each WatchState signal is independently clocked and joined by the rule its meaning demands: resume by greater clock (tie keeps the further position, never rewind), watched/reset/removed by max clock, times_watched by max. The merge is commutative/associative/idempotent (a CRDT), pinned here so Rust/TS/Swift converge to byte-identical state. Integer-only.
